name: uiforge
description: A taste compiler for UI — forge masterpiece interfaces, not AI slop. Bring a reference (or commit a direction); UIForge measures it into a signature, ranks fitting components from a catalog, and loops the build on a two-tier gate (source linter + rendered WCAG/craft audit, reference-relative) with contrast held as an absolute a11y floor. Use for building or elevating any UI, landing page, hero, dashboard, or interaction.
